Convert a NT pathname to a file URL and vice versa.
This module only exists to provide OS-specific code
for urllib.requests, thus do not use directly.
z{OS-specific conversion from a relative URL of the 'file' scheme
    to a file system path; not recommended for general use.
////
z	Bad URL: 
string
urllib.parse
replace
split
parseZ
unquote
join
lenZ
ascii_letters
OSError
upper
endswith)
urlr
urllib
components
comp
error
drive
path
"/usr/lib64/python3.9/nturl2path.py
url2pathname
z{OS-specific conversion from a file system path to a relative URL
    of the 'file' scheme; not recommended for general use.r
\\?\z
UNC\r
Bad path: z
maxsplitz
///)
quoter
pathname2url-
__doc__r
<module>
